# Chinese Culture Studio
> Discover ancient Chinese wisdom — I Ching divination, Chinese name creation, auspicious date selection, and palm reading. Algorithmically generated cultural interpretations based on classical Chinese texts including the Zhouyi (Book of Changes), traditional naming conventions, and the Chinese calendar system.

## Core Tools
- [I Ching Divination](https://www.culture-of-china.com/divination): Traditional 3-coin method divination with hexagram interpretations drawn from the Zhouyi (周易), Tuan Zhuan (彖传), and Xiang Zhuan (象传) commentaries. Full results include main hexagram, changing lines, nuclear trigrams, and transformed hexagram.
- [Chinese Name Creation](https://www.culture-of-china.com/naming): Generate authentic Chinese names based on gender, birth date, and desired qualities. Names reference Bazi (八字) analysis and Five Elements (五行) theory.
- [Auspicious Date Selection](https://www.culture-of-china.com/calendar): Select favorable dates for weddings, business openings, travel, and other important events based on the Chinese almanac (通书/Tong Shu) tradition.
- [Palm Reading](https://www.culture-of-china.com/palm-reading): Upload a palm photo for AI-powered analysis of career, love, health, and wealth lines.

## Educational Guides
- [I Ching Beginner's Guide](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/iching-beginner): Introduction to the Book of Changes for newcomers.
- [Complete I Ching Guide](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/iching): In-depth exploration of the 64 hexagrams and their meanings.
- [Five Elements (Wu Xing)](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/five-elements): The philosophy of Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water.
- [Chinese Zodiac](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/chinese-zodiac): The 12 animal signs and their characteristics.
- [Chinese Name Guide](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/chinese-name): How Chinese names are structured and chosen.
- [Feng Shui Basics](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/feng-shui): Principles of environmental harmony.
- [Face Reading (Mian Xiang)](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/face-reading): Traditional Chinese physiognomy.
- [Dream Interpretation](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/dream-meaning): Chinese cultural approach to dream symbolism.
- [Lucky Numbers](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/lucky-numbers): Numerology in Chinese culture.
- [Auspicious Wedding Dates 2026](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/wedding-dates-2026): Best wedding dates according to Chinese tradition.
- [Chinese New Year 2027 Guide](https://www.culture-of-china.com/guide/chinese-new-year-2027): Traditions and preparations for the Year of the Goat.

## Daily Content
- [Daily I Ching Reading](https://www.culture-of-china.com/daily): Get a fresh hexagram reading every day with cultural commentary.
- [World Cup 2026 Predictions](https://www.culture-of-china.com/world-cup): I Ching predictions for the 2026 FIFA World Cup matches (June 11 – July 26, 2026).

## Languages
Available in English, Russian (русский), Japanese (日本語), and Korean (한국어).

## About
Chinese Culture Studio combines classical Chinese texts with algorithmic generation to make traditional cultural practices accessible worldwide. All interpretations are for entertainment purposes. Sources include the Zhouyi (Book of Changes, ca. 1000 BCE), the Tong Shu (Chinese Almanac), and traditional naming and physiognomy manuals.

## Technical
- Framework: Next.js 14 with server-side rendering
- Structured data: JSON-LD (Organization, WebSite, WebApplication, Article, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage)
- Sitemap: Auto-generated with hreflang alternates for all 4 languages
- RSS: Available at /api/rss
